name: Urine Albumin-Creatinine Ratio (UACR) Test Codes
description: CPT and LOINC codes for urine albumin-creatinine ratio (UACR), urine microalbumin, and related kidney function screening tests. Used in kidney health evaluation for patients with diabetes (KED) and nephropathy screening measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Urine albumin; semiquantitative (e.g., reagent strip assay)
Urinalysis, by dip stick or tablet reagent; non-automated, with microscopy
Urinalysis, by dip stick or tablet reagent; automated, with microscopy
Urinalysis, by dip stick or tablet reagent; automated, without microscopy
Microalbumin [Mass/volume] in Urine by Detection limit <= 3.0 mg/L
